name: OpenAI Codex (AGENTS.md, skills, MCP, subagents)
context_primitives: Repository-local AGENTS.md for standing instructions; Skills for reusable workflows; Memories for durable notes; MCP for external tools/resources; subagents to delegate focused subtasks with isolated transcripts.
deployment_pattern: Codex CLI or IDE flows read AGENTS.md automatically; enable MCP servers in config; users curate skills and memories instead of pasting repeat context.
benchmarks_eval_alignment: Codex models appear on coding leaderboards; context features are not separately scored in public SWE tables.
ecosystem_integrations: GitHub, VS Code family, MCP servers, optional hosted execution.
differentiators: Explicit multi-layer customization (memories + skills + agents) marketed for long-horizon coding agents vs. single chat thread only.
significance_for_builders: Mirror the pattern: pin stable norms in AGENTS.md, push procedural playbooks to skills, push volatile investigation notes to memories, push integrations to MCP.
key_timeline_or_milestones: OpenAI Codex documentation emphasizes customization stack in 2025 public preview materials.
